last_verification_result: Fresh S03 slice verification passed (15 backend tests, 4 web tests). Recovery UAT also proved the evaluable and not-evaluable report first-screen states after applying Alembic head, and live admin APIs exposed projection-backed supervisor preview fields and canonical report session ids.
last_success_signal: S03 is complete: learner reports now lead with unified-evidence verdicts/issues/next goals, dead export affordance is removed again and test-locked, and supervisor previews/drill-ins now stay on the same canonical /practice/{sessionId}/report evidence line.
next_action: Reassess the roadmap after S03 completion. S06 is now directly unblocked, and any future supervisor runtime UAT should start by checking Alembic head so admin preview failures are not misread as frontend regressions.
